name: Operative staffing need (realized)
description: Realized operative person-days (= total on-site minus the constant 8 admin desks). Scoring target. expected_value is the optimiser-planned operative total.

name: Total on-site staffing
description: Realized total on-site person-days (operative + 8 admin). expected_value is the planned total (planned operative + 8).

name: Picks volume
description: Outbound pick lines. value = realized, expected_value = forecast.

name: Outbound pallets volume
description: Outbound full pallets. value = realized, expected_value = forecast.

name: Inbound pallets volume
description: Inbound pallets received. value = realized, expected_value = forecast.
